{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200812CA4B9D83F28571C54BC7"}"},"total":3964},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7318385935682880295","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"脑洞很大的一篇历史脑洞文，统子通过女主做历史盘点视频，让对应历史朝代能看到投屏，扭转了原来衰败的轨道，开启新的篇章！
通过穿越华夏的历史长河，纠正了一些历史错误和遗憾，衍生出了好几个平行时空，尤其是嬴政大人开拓了新的疆土（不用学英语啦[笑]），有种热血的感觉，还有汉朝的巫蛊之祸，隋朝的二世而亡，唐朝宋朝明朝等等……挺好看的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703945867,"group_id":"7217087608516512768","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyBhQOZhXOzx7QlNd5u4zBI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c10d226fa6b14da9b87d631d01f3eb79~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776797103&x-signature=Qi6Ul9KUU2M29ZAzfhd589O%2FKyo%3D","user_id":"69442115057","user_name":"红叶酱"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"69442115057","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7217087608516512768","book_info":{"abstract":"［无cp历史直播文］
（你想过传奇的大秦航海时代吗？全世界争着学习秦语。你想过大汉征服时代吗？不仅有霍去病卫青的传奇，还有大汉女医太学院，大汉传奇女兵……）
秦九是一位初出茅庐的历史博主，原本只是失业之后尝试着做历史视频，没想到被投影到了平行时空的历史朝代。
第一个视频《他，三年败光了整个王朝》让秦始皇气的直接提剑砍儿子。
第二个视频《他，十四年败光六百万户人口》把隋文帝直接气晕，对着儿子杨广大喊拿命来！
第三个视频《他，东汉灭亡的缔造者》
……
之后《盘点历史上那些燃情诗句，霸气宣言》
《盘点历史上的修仙皇帝》《盘点历史上那些传奇女子》《盘点历史上那些富可敌国的大臣们》
一个个视频横空出世，各个时空皇帝们在咬牙切齿的同时，也在拼命地改造自己的王朝，一个比一个内卷，创造了一个又一个时代传奇……
等到秦九被联系上的时候，她才震惊的发现，这些平行时空的国家竟然已经打倒新大陆去了？！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8649f74ff71f732142c7e5c64e25d598","author":"异月霜华","author_id":"","book_id":"7217087608516512768","book_name":"给祖宗播放天幕，挽千古意难平","book_short_name":"皇帝内卷日常","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#703018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":253,"name":"古言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=253&name=古言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7220322988200034820","read_count":"26774","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1012409"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"482","tags":"古言脑洞,古代言情,系统,直播,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/437e25555dcabc4e0d8234d4dac42b10~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451692&x-signature=Cozgko4UMVgYi%2BdRXYrPcol2vI4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1961953076456183","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"622"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323200812CA4B9D83F28571C54BC7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读27小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":98595,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3024},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585045238856499992","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，才看了不到一百章，但是对于书荒的我还挺吸引的，有些评论说女主咋还不知道系统的存在，可千万别知道，主角知道有系统的题材已经看得腻的不能在腻了，我可以接受主角最后知道，但不接受中途知道，不想有目的的去发视频，要不然我会感觉跟吃了苍蝇一样恶心🤢，目前看非常好看，对于我一个历史全还给老师的人，十分友好哈哈哈哈哈哈，可以冲"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766033679,"group_id":"7217087608516512768","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"情不知何起，一往而深","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxbdcsIJDv4An/dRMzrQQ7JkRJvkV/y6lylre9cInrRX","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/db023576548b474b8238f122942644ca~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793225&x-signature=w%2BOGnmnhoK5wp6DuP%2FsLqjpYGeE%3D","user_id":"3813530250516093","user_name":"归故悠悠"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3813530250516093","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7217087608516512768","book_info":{"abstract":"［无cp历史直播文］
